case_title: MARK ANTHONY SIMMONS VS. MIGUEL A RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY SIMMONS, MARK ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIGUEL A DBA MIGUEL JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANIASH INTERPRETER TO MAR-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARK ANTHONY SIMMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL A. RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUEST A CONTINUANCE FOR A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, MARK ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIGUEL A DBA MIGUEL JEWELRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, MARK ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIGUEL A DBA MIGUEL JEWELRY
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-19-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MIGUEL A DBA MIGUEL JEWELRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG.PLAINTIFF MARK ANTHONY SIMMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL A RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
